Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus M5 Timings - Mazyad Mall to Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan Mosque

October 14, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation network provides affordable, reliable service throughout the city and nearby suburbs. One notable route, Bus M5, runs from Mazyad Mall to Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan Mosque, covering a series of popular stops along the way. This guide offers a complete overview of the M5 route, covering operational timings, major stops, and travel tips to help you plan your journey efficiently.

Operational Details

Bus M5 operates consistently throughout the day, with hourly departures to ensure regular service for commuters and tourists. Below is the detailed schedule for Bus M5, departing from both Mazyad Mall and the Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan Mosque:

From Mazyad Mall From Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan Mosque
05:15 06:35
06:15 07:35
07:15 08:35
08:15 09:35
09:15 10:35
10:15 11:35
11:15 12:35
12:15 13:35
13:15 14:35
14:15 15:35
15:15 16:35
16:15 17:35
17:15 18:35
18:15 19:35
19:15 20:35
20:15 21:35
21:15 22:35

Download PDF Bus M5

Bus M5 Timetable

To view the full schedule, visit the official AD Mobility website or simply follow this link for the M5 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Payments for Bus M5 can be made using the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s convenient cashless payment system. For journeys within a single zone, fares are AED 2, with an extra charge of AED 0.05 per kilometer for additional distance. Passengers can easily top up their Hafilat cards online or at kiosks throughout the city, ensuring a hassle-free, cashless experience.

Route Overview

The M5 bus route covers a variety of important stops, from retail and residential areas to essential services and cultural landmarks. Here’s a breakdown of the key stops along the way:

  1. Mazyad Mall (Start/Intermediate Stop): A prominent shopping destination in Abu Dhabi.

  2. Capital Mall: A popular spot for shopping and dining.

  3. Emirates Transport: Convenient for connecting with other transportation services.

  4. Street 15: A residential area providing access to local communities.

  5. Sharjah Islamic Bank: A key financial services stop.

  6. Ali Khalfan Rashid Al Mutawa Al Daheri Mosque: A peaceful stop for those interested in local culture.

  7. ADNOC Vehicle Inspection Centre: A service center for vehicle inspections and maintenance.

  8. Mar Thoma Church: A community landmark with cultural significance.

  9. Ahalia Hospital: Offering access to medical facilities.

  10. Village Mall: A local shopping spot for daily essentials.

  11. Street 12 & Street 17: Providing additional residential access.

  12. Tasheel: An administrative center for government services.

  13. ADDC Central Store: A central store for utilities.

  14. Al Jimi Worker Village: Serving the worker community with essential facilities.

  15. Drivers and Vehicles Licensing Department: Providing licensing and registration services.

16.

  1. Al Saqlawi Street & Al Basrah Street: Residential areas connecting local communities.

  2. Emirates Identity Authority Factory: A government facility for identification services.

  3. Western Region Development Council: Supporting development initiatives in the region.

  4. First Abu Dhabi Bank: A hub for financial services.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Daraj Street: A residential stop within the community.

  2. Al Rasi Street: Serving local residents in the area.

  3. Tawwaq Street: Providing convenient access for nearby neighborhoods.

  4. Al Baleel Street: A stop for residents along this street.

  5. Al Angham Street: Connecting local communities with the bus route.

  6. Al Mawaleed Street: Serving residents and nearby facilities.

  7. Al Saleel Street: A stop within the residential area.

  8. Maqta’at Street: Providing access to communities along this street.

  9. Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan Mosque: A significant cultural landmark and popular attraction for tourists.

This extensive route meets practical needs for residents while offering visitors a convenient way to explore several prominent sites and cultural landmarks in Abu Dhabi.

Accessibility and Services

Key accessibility features include:

  • Wheelchair Ramps for easy boarding.

  • Reserved Seating for passengers with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-Visual Aids to assist those with hearing or vision impairments.

These amenities ensure the M5 is an inclusive and accessible option for all.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Passengers on Bus M5 have convenient access to several of Abu Dhabi’s attractions:

  1. Dalma Mall: A popular spot for shopping and entertainment.

  2. Mar Thoma Church: A spiritual stop for those interested in local religious sites.

3.

Journey Experience

The M5 bus journey from Mazyad Mall to Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan Mosque offers passengers a scenic, extended ride through Abu Dhabi’s varied urban landscape.

This route serves as both a convenient mode of transportation and a window into Abu Dhabi’s rich blend of tradition and progress.

Travel Tips for Bus M5

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus schedule to avoid peak travel times and ensure timely departures.

  • Use a Hafilat Card: This makes payments quick and hassle-free, allowing for a smooth travel experience across Abu Dhabi.
  • Monitor Real-Time Updates: Use the AD Mobility app to stay updated on schedules and avoid unexpected delays.
  • Avoid Peak Hours: If you prefer a quieter ride, consider traveling during off-peak hours.

In conclusion, Bus M5 is a dependable, cost-effective, and inclusive option for traversing Abu Dhabi, linking key shopping centers, residential neighborhoods, and cultural attractions.

So, hop on Bus M5 to effortlessly explore Abu Dhabi’s landmarks while benefiting from convenient and frequent service throughout the day. For a comprehensive overview of all available routes, check out the full Abu Dhabi bus list.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 14, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
